General Henry Lee's funeral oration for George Washington contains the line "First in war, first in peace, & first" here
questions.answer: "first in the hearts of his countrymen"

final.clue: David Livingstone wrote of this discovery of his, "Scenes so lovely must have been gazed upon by angels in their flight"
